name: forth_see
summary: NanoISA decompiler for the Forth SEE word. Reads .nvm bytecode and disassembles the implementation of any built-in Forth word down to NanoISA opcodes.
use_when: Implementing a Forth SEE decompiler that shows NanoISA bytecode
Debugging or inspecting Forth built-in word implementations at ISA level
avoid_when: General purpose NVM disassembly (use nanoisa tools instead)
